The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] '''Fleet Shuttle''', known informally amongst crewmen and officers as the '''gig''', was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] similar in size to an [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] and a [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE Interceptor]].

==History==
Fleet shuttles were used for routine ferrying of personnel between nearby New Republic warships. During combat, some pilots, such as [[Second Lieutenant/Legends|Second Lieutenant]] [[Plat Mallar]] aboard the ''[[Mandjur]]'', were commanded to fly fleet shuttles to recover dead or extravehicular pilots. Even other shuttles, such as the ''[[Tampion]]'', were used for long-range interstellar VIP personnel transport.

Fleet shuttles were amongst the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Third Fleet|Third]], [[New Republic Fourth Fleet|Fourth]], and [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth]] [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|Fleets]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]''
